title: Argon Tableware Coloured Coffee Mugs - Blue - 350ml - Pack of 6 - Gloss Ceramic Stoneware Latte Cappuccino Cups Hot Chocolate Cups Colourful Mug Set with Handle
features: ☕ Durable Porcelain Construction – Crafted from high-quality porcelain, these mugs are designed to withstand everyday use while maintaining their elegant appearance. Perfect for modern homes, they offer long-lasting durability and reliability for years to come.

🎨 Vibrant & Stylish Glazed Design – Featuring a beautifully glazed exterior, these mugs are available in a variety of stunning colours, making them an ideal accent piece for minimalist kitchens or a bold contrast against vibrant décor and appliances.

🥛 Generous 350ml Capacity – With a spacious 340ml capacity, these mugs are perfect for your favourite beverages, from coffee and tea to hot chocolate and soups, ensuring you can enjoy every sip without constant refills.

🧼 Microwave & Dishwasher Safe – Designed for everyday convenience, these mugs are safe for both microwave use and dishwasher cleaning, offering effortless reheating and easy maintenance for busy households.

📏 Perfectly Sized & Comfortable Grip – Each mug measures 8.5cm in diameter, 12.1cm in width (including the handle), and 9.1cm in height. The ergonomic handle ensures a secure, comfortable grip for a relaxed drinking experience every time.
description: Product Description Add a splash of colour to your home or office kitchen and get that perfect caffeine kick in style with these Coloured Coffee Mugs from Argon Tableware, crafted from durable stoneware with a vibrant coloured exterior that works perfectly as an eye-catching accent in any kitchen.
